About

Engineer by training,
builder by instinct.

I'm an aerospace engineering master's student at TU Darmstadt with a background that bridges structural design for commercial aircraft and hands-on UAV development. My work spans two continents — two years working on Airbus A320 and A350 programs in Bangalore, and now deep in Germany's UAV and research ecosystem.

At Dronivo, I design and prototype drone components from scratch. At TU Darmstadt's SAM institute, I set up experimental rigs and process multi-channel vibration data. I'm equally comfortable in a CAD suite and on the bench with a soldering iron.

Currently based in Darmstadt, actively working toward B2 German. Non-EU citizen with valid residence permit through March 2027.

Experience

Where I've worked.

Dronivo GmbH Sept 2025 – Present
Working Student — Mechanical Designer (Drones & UAV) · Mannheim, Germany
  • Designed 30+ structural and electronic housing components for UAV and drone assemblies.
  • Customised MILAN 17 UAV platform through hands-on lab work: assembly, functional bench testing, soldering, and wiring of electronic systems.
  • Reverse engineered existing parts and developed improved replacements — reducing development time by ~25% through rapid design iterations and prototyping (FDM & SLA). Assembled and validated 10+ UAV system types within delivery period.
SolidWorksFDMSLA UAV AssemblyBench TestingSoldering
TU Darmstadt — SAM Institute Sept 2024 – Mar 2025
Student Research Assistant (HiWi) · Darmstadt, Germany
  • Conducted vibration and acoustic measurements using Doppler laser vibrometer interfaced with dSpace real-time system; acquired and processed multi-channel signals.
  • Performed post-processing and analysis of measurement data in MATLAB; generated structured test reports documenting results across each measurement campaign.
  • Carried out repeated assembly and disassembly of experimental rigs, ensuring setup repeatability and data consistency.
Doppler Laser VibrometerdSpace MATLABData AcquisitionTest Reports
L&T Technology Services — Airbus Program Sept 2021 – Oct 2023
Mechanical Design Engineer (A320 & A350) · Bangalore, India
  • Created and maintained 200+ 3D CAD models in CATIA V5 for structural integration across A320 and A350 programs; produced 50+ technical drawings, BOMs and manufacturing instructions — reducing validation time by 15%.
  • Performed DMU kinematics, clearance and clash analysis — reduced final assembly rework by 25%. Conducted GD&T tolerance analyses across 10+ assemblies ensuring 100% design conformance.
  • Reviewed and responded to Engineering Change Requests (ECRs), updating 3D models and technical documentation to ensure configuration baseline compliance.
CATIA V5DMUGD&T ECR ManagementBOMsA320A350
